presets.label: OpenClaw Default
presets.description: Keeps the native OpenClaw shape language while normalizing spacing, controls, and repaired surfaces.
presets.nativeDescription: 保留 OpenClaw 原本的形态语言，同时统一间距、控件和修补后的表面层次。

presets.label: Material Design
presets.description: Clear outlines, tonal surfaces, layered elevation, and stronger state feedback inspired by Material components.
presets.nativeDescription: 借鉴 Material 组件的清晰描边、色调表面、分层海拔和更明确的状态反馈。

variables.surface-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 82%, var(--accent) 18%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg) 90%, transparent) 100%)
variables.control-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--input) 78%, var(--accent) 22%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--input) 90%, transparent) 100%)
variables.control-hover-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--input) 66%, var(--accent) 34%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 88%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 70%, var(--accent) 30%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg) 92%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-hover-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 66%, var(--accent) 34%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 28%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-primary-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 88%, white 12%) 0%, var(--accent) 100%)
variables.button-active-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 74%, var(--bg-elevated) 26%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 54%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-active-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 24%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)
variables.menu-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 84%, var(--accent) 16%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg) 92%, transparent) 100%)

presets.label: Flat Design
presets.description: Sharper geometry, solid fills, reduced depth, and cleaner block-to-block contrast.
presets.nativeDescription: 更利落的几何边角、更实的填充、更轻的层次，以及更直接的块面反差。

presets.label: Frosted Glass
presets.description: Translucent layers, softer highlights, and blurred surfaces for a restrained glass treatment.
presets.nativeDescription: 半透明层次、柔和高光与模糊表面，让界面呈现克制的毛玻璃质感。

variables.surface-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 52%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18) 48%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 48%, transparent) 100%)
variables.control-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--input) 68%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18) 32%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--input) 56%, transparent) 100%)
variables.control-hover-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 62%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22) 38%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 46%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 60%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22) 40%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 56%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-hover-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 60%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.26) 40%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 48%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-primary-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 70%, white 30%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 86%, var(--bg-elevated) 14%) 100%)
variables.button-primary-shadow: 0 18px 36px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 60%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16)
variables.button-active-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 82%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18) 18%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 58%, var(--bg-elevated) 42%) 100%)
variables.button-active-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 16%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16)
variables.menu-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 58%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18) 42%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 54%, transparent) 100%)

presets.label: Soft Neumorphism
presets.description: Diffuse highlights, pill-like depth, and inset shadows for a softer tactile control style.
presets.nativeDescription: 扩散高光、柔和厚度和内凹阴影，呈现更轻的拟物触感。

variables.surface-bg: linear-gradient(145deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 80%, white 20%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg) 92%, transparent) 100%)
variables.control-bg: linear-gradient(145deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--input) 78%, white 22%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg) 92%, transparent) 100%)
variables.control-hover-bg: linear-gradient(145deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--input) 68%, var(--accent-subtle) 32%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 92%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-bg: linear-gradient(145deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 78%, white 22%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg) 92%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-hover-bg: linear-gradient(145deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 70%, var(--accent-subtle) 30%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg) 92%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-primary-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 82%, white 18%) 0%, var(--accent) 100%)
variables.menu-bg: linear-gradient(145deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 84%, white 16%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg) 94%, transparent) 100%)

presets.label: Glass Lens
presets.description: Glossy lens-like gradients, stronger internal highlights, and brightened glass edges inspired by layered mobile glass UI.
presets.nativeDescription: 借鉴移动端玻璃 UI 的镜面渐变、更强的内高光和更亮的玻璃边缘。

variables.surface-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 58%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28) 42%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 16%, transparent) 52%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 64%, transparent) 100%)
variables.control-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--input) 66%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.26) 34%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 12%, transparent) 48%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--input) 54%, transparent) 100%)
variables.control-hover-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 64%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28) 36%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 28%, transparent) 50%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 54%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 62%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) 38%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 14%, transparent) 52%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 58%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-hover-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 60%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32) 40%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 30%, transparent) 50%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 52%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-primary-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 62%, white 38%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 74%, var(--bg-hover) 26%) 48%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 86%, var(--bg) 14%) 100%)
variables.button-primary-shadow: 0 18px 40px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 60%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24)
variables.button-active-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 78%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22) 22%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 56%, var(--bg-hover) 44%) 52%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 44%, transparent) 100%)
variables.button-active-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 20%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22)
variables.menu-bg: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-elevated) 64%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.26) 36%) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-subtle) 14%, transparent) 48%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-hover) 58%, transparent) 100%)
